use_cases: Audio player background visualization for media applications
Interactive landing page hero animation with audio aesthetic
Background waveform display for music or podcast platforms
Cyberpunk-styled UI elements for creative/entertainment apps
Real-time audio visualization component for audio editing tools
ai_summary: An animated sonic waveform canvas component featuring a cyberpunk neon aesthetic with 60 animated wave lines that respond to mouse position. The visualization uses mathematical wave calculations with noise and spike functions creating organic, flowing motion patterns. Perfect for media applications, audio players, or as an interactive background element for entertainment and creative platforms.
